overview.title: 📝 OVERVIEW
items: Configures rules for extracting text from XML mod files
Defines which tags to translate and which to skip

whitelist.title: ✅ WHITELIST
items: List of XML tags that ARE extracted for translation
Add tags that need to be translated
Remove tags that are not needed

blacklist.title: ❌ BLACKLIST
items: List of XML tags that ARE SKIPPED

patterns.title: 🔍 PATTERNS
items: If key contains pattern, it is skipped

settings.title: ⚙️ SETTINGS
items: Minimum length — strings shorter are not extracted
Aggressive fallback — extract all tags (may add noise)
Recommended to test settings before batch translation

usage.title: 💡 USAGE
items: 5. Restart the program to apply changes

tips.title: 📋 TIPS
items: Don't remove tags from whitelist without need
Add only technical tags to blacklist
Aggressive fallback may add noise to translation
